titles.title: bw_timex: A Python Package for Time-Explicit Life Cycle Assessment

institution.institution_name: Institute of Technical Thermodynamics (LTT), RWTH Aachen University, Germany
Institute of Environmental Sciences (CML), Leiden University, The Netherlands
Flemish Institute for Technology Research (VITO), EnergyVille, Belgium

Technology Assessment Group, Laboratory for Energy Analysis, Center for Nuclear Engineering and Sciences & Center for Energy and Environmental Sciences, Paul Scherrer Institut (PSI), Villigen PSI, Switzerland

citation.article_title: PRospective EnvironMental Impact asSEment (premise): A streamlined approach to producing databases for prospective life cycle assessment using integrated assessment models
citation.author: Sacchi
citation.unstructured_citation: Sacchi, R., Terlouw, T., Siala, K., Dirnaichner, A., Bauer, C., Cox, B., Mutel, C., Daioglou, V., & Luderer, G. (2022). PRospective EnvironMental Impact asSEment (premise): A streamlined approach to producing databases for prospective life cycle assessment using integrated assessment models. Renewable and Sustainable Energy Reviews, 160. https://doi.org/10.1016/j.rser.2022.112311

citation.article_title: Brightway: An open source framework for Life Cycle Assessment
citation.author: Mutel
citation.unstructured_citation: Mutel, C. (2017). Brightway: An open source framework for Life Cycle Assessment. Journal of Open Source Software, 2(12), 236. https://doi.org/10.21105/joss.00236

citation.article_title: Temporalis, a generic method and tool for dynamic Life Cycle Assessment
citation.author: Cardellini
citation.unstructured_citation: Cardellini, G., Mutel, C. L., Vial, E., & Muys, B. (2018). Temporalis, a generic method and tool for dynamic Life Cycle Assessment. Science of The Total Environment, 645, 585–595. https://doi.org/10.1016/j.scitotenv.2018.07.044

citation.article_title: Pathways: Life cycle assessment of energy transition scenarios

citation.article_title: Addressing temporal considerations in life cycle assessment
citation.author: Beloin-Saint-Pierre
citation.unstructured_citation: Beloin-Saint-Pierre, D., Albers, A., Hélias, A., Tiruta-Barna, L., Fantke, P., Levasseur, A., Benetto, E., Benoist, A., & Collet, P. (2020). Addressing temporal considerations in life cycle assessment. Science of The Total Environment, 743, 140700. https://doi.org/10.1016/j.scitotenv.2020.140700

citation.journal_title: The International Journal of Life Cycle Assessment

citation.article_title: Time-explicit life cycle assessment: A flexible framework for coherent consideration of temporal dynamics
citation.author: Müller
citation.journal_title: The International Journal of Life Cycle Assessment

The International Journal of Life Cycle Assessment. https://doi.org/10.1007/s11367-025-02539-3

citation.journal_title: The International Journal of Life Cycle Assessment
